title: Mild Weather Accompanies Elevated Fire Risk
summary: A warming trend continues with seasonable temperatures in the 60s, but elevated fire risk is a concern.
charlotte_impact: Elevated fire risk requires caution and adherence to local fire safety guidelines to prevent wildfires.

title: Manhunt Underway for Teen Suspect in Fatal Shooting
summary: Chesterfield County deputies are searching for Jeremiah Lockhart, wanted for murder in a fatal shooting of a 17-year-old.
charlotte_impact: The manhunt highlights the severity of gun violence and the urgent need for justice and community safety.

title: Fatal Shooting Reported Near Matthews Bowling Alley
summary: One person is dead after a shooting near a Matthews bowling alley. The investigation is ongoing.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about public safety in recreational areas and the potential for escalating violence.

title: Urgent Search for Missing 2-Year-Old Boy in Charlotte
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police are seeking the public's help to find a missing 2-year-old boy last seen near Cardinal and June drives.
charlotte_impact: The disappearance of a young child necessitates immediate community involvement and police action for a safe return.

title: Woman Fatally Shot at North Charlotte Apartment
summary: A woman was shot and killed through her front door at a north Charlotte apartment complex. Police are investigating.
charlotte_impact: This incident underscores the dangers of gun violence and the need for increased security measures in residential areas.

title: CMPD Investigates Fatal Crash in Northeast Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a fatal traffic collision that occurred on Monmouth Drive in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Fatal crashes highlight the importance of safe driving practices and road safety measures to prevent future tragedies.

title: Two Fatalities Reported in Rock Hill Collision
summary: A fatal collision on S.C Highway 72 and Autumnwood Drive in Rock Hill resulted in two deaths, according to SCHP.
charlotte_impact: This collision emphasizes the need for caution on highways and adherence to traffic laws to minimize accidents.

title: Burning Ban Implemented in Charlotte Region Due to Drought
summary: Open burning is banned within 100 feet of dwellings in the Charlotte region due to drought and wildfire risks.
charlotte_impact: Burning bans are crucial for preventing wildfires during dry conditions, protecting property and lives.

title: 'No Kings' Protests Held Across the Carolinas
summary: Thousands participated in 'No Kings' demonstrations in North and South Carolina, protesting against President Trump.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrations reflect ongoing political discourse and public engagement with government policies and leadership.

title: Driver Charged After Hitting Woman, Baby in Crosswalk
summary: A driver was charged after striking a woman and baby in a downtown Matthews crosswalk at West John Street and North Trade Street.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights pedestrian safety concerns and the need for drivers to exercise caution in crosswalks.

title: One Dead in Early Morning Crash on I-85 South
summary: A fatal crash on I-85 South near University City Boulevard has resulted in one death, according to Medic.
charlotte_impact: Fatal crashes on major highways underscore the importance of safe driving practices and highway safety measures.

title: Statewide Open Burning Ban Issued in North Carolina
summary: North Carolina has issued a statewide open burning ban, canceling all existing permits due to wildfire risk.
charlotte_impact: Statewide burning bans are essential for preventing wildfires and protecting natural resources during periods of high risk.

title: Two New Rabies Cases Confirmed in Lincoln County
summary: Lincoln County Animal Services confirmed two new rabies cases in 2026 from a skunk and a fox.
charlotte_impact: Rabies cases highlight the importance of pet vaccinations and caution around wild animals to prevent disease transmission.

title: One Injured in Overnight Shooting in West Charlotte
summary: One person was injured in an overnight shooting near Freedom Drive around 2 a.m., Medic confirmed.
charlotte_impact: Shootings raise concerns about community safety and the need for violence prevention strategies in high-risk areas.

title: Three Injured After Crash in Northeast Charlotte
summary: Three people are hospitalized with serious injuries after a crash in northeast Charlotte early Saturday.
charlotte_impact: Serious injuries from car accidents highlight the need for safe driving habits and awareness to prevent severe consequences.
